steps.name: Add 4 evaluator rules to pes-config.json
criteria: pes-config.json contains 8 rules total (4 existing wave_ordering + 4 new)
PDC gate rule blocks Wave 5 entry when any Tier 1/2 PDC item is RED
Deadline blocking rule blocks non-essential waves within 3 critical days
Submission immutability rule blocks all writes after proposal submitted
Corpus integrity rule blocks outcome tag modification on learning entries

steps.name: Integration tests proving end-to-end wiring
criteria: Tests load real pes-config.json through JsonRuleAdapter
Engine dispatches each new rule_type to the correct evaluator
PDC gate evaluator triggers BLOCK on RED Tier 1/2 and ALLOW otherwise
Deadline, submission, and corpus evaluators BLOCK on matching conditions
Each evaluator returns ALLOW when its conditions are not met
